title: The McEliece Cryptosystem: Original Code-Based Encryption
description: Master the McEliece cryptosystem, the oldest unbroken public-key encryption scheme. Understand key generation, encryption, decryption, and why 40+ years of cryptanalysis haven't found practical attacks.
learningObjectives: Implement complete McEliece key generation, encryption, and decryption
Understand the role of Goppa codes and their disguise
Analyze the security based on syndrome decoding hardness
Calculate key sizes and security parameters
